source_of_truth_assumption: No source-of-truth ownership is assigned by this Apps Script project. The search tool reads configured Sheets and Drive folders only, groups duplicate candidates for review, and never merges or writes records.
sync_question_for_dashboard_agent: Confirm the owner database, approved readiness vocabulary, duplicate resolution status vocabulary, source-system rules, and schema revision before any write-back, sync, duplicate cleanup, or readiness status update is added.
pending_decisions: Confirm the canonical owner database for each metadata field.
Confirm the Notion databases in scope and their source/consumer roles.
Confirm the approved readiness vocabulary and aliases for CURRICULUM_SEARCH_READINESS_VOCABULARY.
Confirm whether governance-compliance-search-feature should be promoted to the release branch after review.
Confirm whether canonical_record_url should be required for duplicate grouping.
handoff_prompt:
Dashboard Sync Agent, please review this Apps Script project handoff before any Notion updates occur.

Check whether the databases in scope are working together efficiently, whether any records or fields would be duplicated, and whether worksheet and slide generation agents can access canonical metadata without re-querying or redefining fields.

Please verify:
1. Which database owns each metadata field.
2. Which fields should be summary-only.
3. Whether any fields or records are duplicates.
4. Whether the generated Apps Script metadata manifest matches the source-of-truth schema.
5. Whether downstream worksheet and slide agents can safely consume this metadata.
6. What changes, if any, should be routed to the owner dashboard.
7. The approved readiness vocabulary and alias mappings.
8. The allowed duplicate resolution statuses.

Return:
- duplicate risk
- owner database
- consuming database
- safe sync path
- blocked fields
- recommended schema cleanup
- approved metadata contract
